Package org.springdoc.core.utils

Class SpringDocUtils

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.core.utils.SpringDocUtils
public class SpringDocUtils extends Object
The type Spring doc utils.
Author:
bnasslahsen

    static void
    fixNullOnlyAdditionalProperties(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema<?> schema)
    Fix additionalProperties incorrectly set to {"type": "null"} when @Nullable propagates from a Map field to its Object value type (resolved as "any type" = {}).
